title: 4 Bunches Pink Flowers Artificial Peonies Roses Bouquet, Fake Hydrangea Peony, Faux Pink Flower That Look Real, for Wedding Bridal Bouquet Home Party Table Décor
features: 【Realistic artifical flowers】: Made of high-quality silk fabric, the leaves have a realistic appearance, full flower heads, and vivid and natural petals. Plastic twigs have wires built into them, which can be bent to fit your vase or made into a good shape for your DIY needs. The bouquet is made with exquisite coloring techniques, and is as natural and real as a real flower, and full of vitality.

【Long-lasting and easy to care for】: Pink flowers artificial requires no watering, no pruning, never wilts, and stays fresh for a long time. Fake flower bouquet is perfect for people who don't have the time and experience with planting or are allergic to pollen. If there is dust or other stains, just blow them off with a low-temperature hair dryer or wipe them off with a soft cloth or sponge

【Wide application】: Artificial rose is suitable for wedding parties, bridal bouquets, home décor and centerpieces for various festivals, bringing elegance and glamour to any environment. They are also great for flower arrangements and bouquet DIY, combining them with fresh or other artificial flowers to create a personalized bouquet that is a one-of-a-kind gift for family or friends

【Size & Packing】: Includes 4 bunches of Artificial Flowers for Decoration. Each bouquet has 7 branches, 1 large peony flower, 2 roses, 4 hydrangeas, and some flaky florets, dense grass, and leaves. The length of the Artificial flower bouquet is approximately 32 cm / 12.6 inches. The large peony flower head is about 7 cm / 2.8 inches in diameter. Roses and hydrangeas are about 5.5 cm / 2.17 inches in diameter. Putting 4 bouquets of faux flowers together makes a complete gorgeous bouquet.

【Note】: Artificial flowers may be flattened due to long transportation, please blow with a hair dryer before decorating to bring the flowers back to fullness. And according to your needs and preferences, manually adjust the shape of each stem and flower to form a full and beautiful bouquet
description: Product Description Artificial Peony Rose Flowers HNVNER Peony Rose Artificial Flowers are well-made, using advanced printing and dyeing technology, the colors are bright and natural, and they look like real flowers, full of vitality and loveliness. Add more elegance and romance to your dining table, wedding, party and home décor. Multiple application scenarios
